iteration_0.issue: Voltage sensitivity analysis and building redistribution logic are completely absent
iteration_0.location: Missing - no function or code block exists for this
iteration_0.recommendation: After first run_grid call, compute per-bus voltage std or max deviation from vm_ts, identify high-sensitivity buses, reassign buildings away from those buses in building_bus_map, then call run_grid again with the new map.

iteration_0.issue: KPI comparison and plot saving between before/after redistribution are not implemented
